<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace NunoMaduro\Collision\Adapters\Phpunit; use NunoMaduro\Collision\Adapters\Phpunit\Subscribers\EnsurePrinterIsRegisteredSubscriber; use PHPUnit\Runner\Version; if (class_exists(Version::class) && (int) Version::series() >= 10) { EnsurePrinterIsRegisteredSubscriber::register(); }
